winner: My barber said I needed a haircut, so he took out his ruler and measured my head from ear to ear. I told him I didn't need it that short, but he said, "Sorry, this is how we measure hair around here.

candidates.text: My hair is so thick, it's actually defying the laws of measure.

candidates.text: A man claimed he could tell if a woman's hair was long enough to measure up to his standards, but it turned out he just meant in inches.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses the required words and has a mild twist, but the humor is somewhat generic and the surprise element is weak."}

candidates.text: I measured my hair after the wash—it grew two inches overnight, but apparently gravity doesn’t follow the same rules as the rest of me.
I measured my hair today—it's exactly six inches, which is disappointing because I was hoping it had shrunk to five and a half after all this "low maintenance" nonsense.
